about.title: About LearnWithHistories
about.missionText: We believe that learning a new language should be accessible, engaging, and effective. LearnWithHistories was created to make your language learning journey more natural and enjoyable through captivating stories and instant translation.
about.whyText: Stories have the power to contextualize language in meaningful ways. When you learn words and phrases within a narrative, they become more memorable. This context-based method accelerates your retention and comprehension.
about.featureImmersive: Natural Immersion - Learn the way native speakers learn, with authentic and engaging texts.
about.featureFlexible: Flexible Translation - Control when to see translations. Build confidence progressively.
about.featureMultilingual: Multilingual - Support for multiple languages with instant translations.
about.featureProgress: Progress Tracking - Keep track of your learning journey.
about.missionDescription: We founded LearnWithHistories with the belief that language learning should not be confined to classrooms or rigid curricula. Language is alive, it evolves with culture and context. By immersing learners in stories, we tap into the same mechanism that native speakers use to internalize their own languages.
about.contextualDesc: Words learned in isolation are often forgotten. But words encountered in a meaningful context stick with you. When you read a story and encounter a new word, you don't just learn a vocabulary item—you learn it through the emotional journey of the narrative.
about.culturalDesc: Language and culture are inseparable. Through stories, you don't just learn words and grammar—you gain insights into how native speakers think, what they value, and how they express themselves.
about.naturalDesc: Stories expose you to grammar, vocabulary, and expressions in a natural flow. Unlike textbooks that isolate grammar rules, stories let you experience language as it's actually used.
about.ctaSub: Join thousands of language learners who have discovered the power of learning through stories.
